All 40 active bimodal tests pass (up from 12 before this task). BX7 linearity and MF_MODAL_FUTURE examples added but excluded from CI via KNOWN_TIMEOUT_EXAMPLES.

memory_candidates.content: In bimodal ModelChecker, TopOperator fails at runtime when used as argument to temporal operators. Use explicit neg-bot instead of top in temporal formula contexts.
Binary operators Until and Since require infix form: (event Until guard). The prefix form fails with KeyError.
BX modal_future axiom: Box(A) -> Box(Future(A)) is NOT a theorem under bimodal ModelChecker semantics (countermodel at N=1, M=2). The related Box(A) -> Future(Box(A)) IS valid.

memory_candidates.content: Z3 quantifier performance tip: when implementing compositionality constraints with 5 quantified variables (w, v, u, d1, d2), use z3.MultiPattern(premise1, premise2) in z3.ForAll(..., patterns=[...]) to guide instantiation only when both premises are in the ground term set.

BimodalSemantics test fixture sizing: for unit tests that load the full frame_constraints list (including skolem_abundance_constraint), use N=2 (4 states) rather than N=3 (8 states) to prevent solver timeout.

artifacts.summary: Temporal operator find_truth_condition() incorrectly assumes arguments FALSE outside interval, causing wrong display truth values for negated/complex arguments
